meta.auditName: Q2 Branch Compliance Audit - South Zone

previousAuditComparison.description: Comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleObservation: Identified several critical non-compliance issues related to data privacy protocols and access controls requiring immediate remediation actions.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Implement robust multi-factor authentication across all sensitive systems and conduct mandatory quarterly privacy training for staff.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleObservation: Observed inconsistent application of security patch management policies across various departmental servers leading to potential vulnerabilities.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleRecommendation: Standardize patch management procedures, enforce timely updates, and conduct regular vulnerability assessments to mitigate risks.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
